name: search_campaigns
description: Query campaigns in your Google Ads account using Google Ads Query Language (GAQL). Returns campaign details including name, status, budget, bidding strategy, and performance metrics. Use GAQL SELECT, FROM, WHERE, ORDER BY, and LIMIT to filter and sort results.

parameters.name: customer_id
parameters.description: The Google Ads customer ID (without dashes).

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: A GAQL query string to select campaign fields and metrics.
parameters.example: SELECT campaign.id, campaign.name, campaign.status, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros FROM campaign WHERE campaign.status = 'ENABLED' ORDER BY metrics.impressions DESC LIMIT 10

body.query: SELECT campaign.id, campaign.name, campaign.status, metrics.impressions, metrics.clicks, metrics.cost_micros FROM campaign WHERE campaign.status = 'ENABLED' ORDER BY metrics.impressions DESC LIMIT 10
